creator: m@kappa.st
text:
Created attachment 232246
Patch 9.5.5 to 9.5.7

Patch from 9.5.5 to 9.5.7

This patch updates www/glpi to the latest version (many important security fixes).

ChangeLogs
- https://github.com/glpi-project/glpi/releases/tag/9.5.6
- https://github.com/glpi-project/glpi/releases/tag/9.5.7

Also attached the Poudriere testport logs. 

Note that I submitted PR #255948 last year with the CVE entries but it's still open and not merged into security/vuxml. Versions 9.5.6 and 9.5.7 fix many new CVE entries also.
